## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Scholarship data correction
- [ ] Feature update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Verification

For scholarship data corrections:

- [ ] I checked an official source link.
- [ ] I included the source link in the change or issue.
- [ ] I checked the deadline/application window.
- [ ] I checked eligibility, income, category, and document notes.

For code changes:

- [ ] I ran `npm test`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run validate:data`.
- [ ] I verified the change does not break login/register or dashboard flows.

## Notes

Add screenshots, source notes, or anything reviewers should know.
